description: Send notifications to your own Mastodon destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise mastodons:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Mastodon statuses payload delivered straight to your Mastodon instance.
name: msg-to-mastodon

request.template: {"urls":"mastodons://${ customer_secrets.MASTODON_TOKEN }@${ customer_secrets.MASTODON_HOST }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}

{"urls":"mastodons://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.token_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }","title":{* _escape_json(_body.title or "") *},"body":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *},"type":{* _escape_json(_body.type or "info") *},"format":{* _escape_json(_body.format or "text") *}}
{"status":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..((_body.body or "") or "")) *}}
{"status":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..((_body.body or "") or "")) *}}
